title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER HOLDS REVIEW MEETING WITH BLOs OF LAWNGTLAI TOWN
content:
152/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 9 June 2026:As part of the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026, the District Election Officer (DEO), Lawngtlai, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, chaired a review meeting with Booth Level Officers (BLOs) of Lawngtlai Town at the DC's Office Chamber today.

During the meeting, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga commended the dedication and commendable efforts of the BLOs in carrying out SIR 2026 activities. Reviewing the status of distribution of Enumeration Forms, he expressed satisfaction with the progress achieved so far. However, he pointed out that greater efforts are required in the collection of Enumeration Forms and the digitization process, and urged the BLOs to intensify their work in these areas.

The DEO also stressed the need for improved performance in Electors Mapping, noting that additional efforts are necessary to achieve better results. He reminded the BLOs that the Election Commission of India (ECI) attaches great importance to SIR 2026 and emphasized the need to continue working diligently to meet the Commission’s expectations. He further urged all BLOs to discharge their responsibilities with utmost sincerity and commitment.

Various issues relating to the progress made by the BLOs were discussed during the meeting. Particular attention was given to the percentage of electors mapped, where it was observed that some BLOs need to put in additional effort to improve their performance. Participants unanimously acknowledged the crucial role played by BLOs in ensuring the successful implementation of SIR 2026 and in maintaining a clean, accurate, and credible Electoral Roll. They resolved to continue working with dedication towards these objectives.

The meeting was attended by the EROs and AEROs of 36-Tuichawng (ST), 37-Lawngtlai West (ST), and 38-Lawngtlai East (ST), along with all BLOs serving within Lawngtlai Town. The meeting concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri Donny Lalruatsanga.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER - IN LAWNGTLAI TOWN CHHUNGA BLO- TE 'REVIEW MEETING' NEIHPUI
content:
900/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 9th June 2026 :SIR 2026 kalpui mek zelah vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Election Officer, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin DC's Office Chamber-ah Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga BLO- ten 'Review Meeting' an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan SIR 2026 kalpui mekah BLO - te inpekna leh hnathawh fakawm a tih thu sawiin, Enumeration Forms semchhuah tawh dinhmun enin hna an thawk tha hle a ti a. Enumeration Forms lakkhawm leh Digitization - lamah hmasawnna tur a awm tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian chak zawka hnathawk turin BLO- te a chah a ni. Electors Mapping - bikah tun aia tan lak nasat a tul tih sawiin, BLO- te thahnemngai taka thawk turin a chah a ni. DEO chuan Election Commission of India (ECI) in SIR 2026 - a ngaipawimawh hle tih hriaa, ECI beisei ang taka hnathawh chhunzawm zel a tul hle tih sawiin, BLO - te an mawhphurhna tha taka hlen turin a chah nghal bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian BLO- hmalak tawhna kawng hrang hrangte sawiho a ni a. A bik takin Electors Mapped Percentage - bikah BLO thenkhatten tan an lak thar a tul hle tiin, chak zawkin hma lo la se an ti a. SIR 2026- tha taka kalpui tur leh Electoral Roll felfai, rintlak leh thianghlim nei turin BLO - an pawimawh hle tih pawm tlangin, thahnemngai taka thawh chhunzawm zel ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin 'Review Meeting' ah hian 36- Tuichawng (ST), 37- Lawngtlai West (ST) leh 38- Lawngtlai East (ST) a ERO, AERO, bakah Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga BLO- te an telkim thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: HSLC & HSSLC Compartmental & Improvement Examination, 2026 Result tichhuak dawn
content:
899/2026-2027

Aizawl the 9th June, 2026:Mizoram Board of School Education chuan ni 10.06.2026 (Nilaini) chawhnu dar 12:30 hian HSLC & HSSLC Compartmental & Improvement Examination, 2026 result tihchhuah a tum a. Result hi MBSE Office, Chaltlang leh MBSE Regional Office, Lunglei leh heng Website -www.inbsc.edu.inlehwww.mbseoniine.com- ahte hian en theihin a awm ang. A mamawh tan result bu lei theihin a awm bawk ang.

Heng a hnuaia number tarlanahte hian office hun chhungin result ngaihven theih a ni ang.

title: SAITUAL DISTRICT-AH PMSMA KUM 10 TLIN LAWMNA HMAN A NI
content:
897/2026-2027

Saitual, the 9th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan (PMSMA) kum 10 tlin champha pualin Saitual District Hospital-ah nu naupai te pual inentirna leh zirtirna hun hman a ni.

He hun hi Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Deputy Chief Medical Officer, Saitual District chuan kaihruaiin, kalkhawm te hnenah PMSMA hman a nih chhan leh a pawimawhna te a sawifiah a. Naupai laia inentir that a pawimawhzia tarlangin, an hriselna atana an hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang te a hrilh bawk a ni.

He hunah hian naupai te tan a thlawn vekin inentirna buatsaih a ni a, Gynaecologist Dr. Lalduhsaka’n naupai te hriselna dinhmun a endik a, Dr. V. Lalremruata’n Ultrasound hmanga naute leh chhul dinhmun a enfiah sak bawk a ni. Naupai lo kal zawng zawng te chu BP leh Zunthlum (RBS) leh Hb te, Blood group, Hepatitis B & C bakah HIV test sak vek an ni a, an mamawh ang zela rawtna leh damdawi te pek nghal an ni.

PMSMA hi Sawrkar Laipui scheme niin thla tin ni 9-ah nau pai te tan a thlawn vekin inentirna neih thin a ni a. A tum ber chu nau pai lai a natna benvawn awm thei te hriat chhuah hma a, nu leh naute thi/hrisel lo tur venna a ni.

Saitual District Hospital chuan PMSMA kum 10 tlin lawmna pual hian naupai zawng zawng te chu thla tin inentirna hun hi lo hmang tangkai zel turin a chah a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT HIGHWAY SAFETY TASK FORCE COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
898/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 9th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai Office Chamber- ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin Lawngtlai District Highway Safety Task Force Committee an thukhawm.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a.Supreme Court thuchhuak ang in 'encrouchment of National Highway' leh 'Illegal Parking at National Highway' chungchangah bawkzui tur tam tak a awm a ti a.Hmalakna turah Department mawhphurhna nei ten theihtawp chhuah a, an mawhphurhnatean hle a pawimawh dawn hle a ti a ni. A bik takin District Administration leh LADC bakah VC, NGO leh mipuite tanho a tul dawn hle tiin, theihtawp chhuahpui turin a sawm nghal bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian 'Encrouchment of National Highway' leh 'Illegal Parking on National Higway' chungchanga Supreme Court- in hmalakna tur point 8 (Pariat) a siamte chu thlirho a ni a. SOP duan leh hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte ngaihtuah niin, a tul anga Team din ngaiahte din a ni a, Periodic Inspection neih thin ni bawk se an ti a. Order- chhuah ngaite DC Office lam leh PWD lam ten chhuah ni se tih niin, hmalakna hrang hrangte report kimchang siamin, ni 60 chhung ngeia Mizoram sawrkarah thehluh ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District Highway Safety Task Force Committee, Member- te an telkim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: VB-G RAM G chungchangah District Level Orientation meeting neih a ni
content:
896/2026-2027

Saitual, the 9th June, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Saitualah, District Bawrhsap, District Programme Coordinator (VB- G RAM G) ni bawk, Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin ni 125 inhlawhna Viksit Bharat - Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) “VB- G RAM G” chungchangah orientation meeting neih a ni.

He hunah hian Pu V. Laldinsanga, Project Director, DRDO chuan thu sawiin, July ni 1-a hman tan tur VB- G RAM G chu ni 100 inhlawhna MGNREGA thlaktu tur a ni tih a sawi a, MGNREGA-a tha tawk lo awm te siam tha tura duan a ni tih a sawi. Project Director chuan VB- G RAM G hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan theih tawp chhuah turin khawtlang hruaitute leh line department te chu a sawm a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian Pu David Lalchhuanawma, AE, DRDO chuan powerpoint presentation hmangin VB- G RAM G chungchang a sawifiah a, zawhna leh chhanna hun an hmang nghal bawk a ni.

Attachment
